item.description:
Release v4.15.0

Changes since v4.14.1

  • feat: add MiniMax TokenPlan provider
  • feat(activity-heatmap): show loading state while fetching data, reorder UI
  • feat(bootstrap): add CrashedView for fatal startup errors
  • fix(auto-task): replace force unwrap with safe optional binding for task access
  • fix(bootstrap): replace force casts with guarded conversions and clear diagnostics
  • fix(bootstrap): replace force try/cast in fallback initializer with guarded versions
  • fix(chat): retry empty LLM responses instead of silently ending turn
  • fix(chat): simplify database init to single-level with clear error on failure
  • fix(cursor): conform CursorTimer to SuperLog protocol
  • fix(cursor): normalize log format with emoji prefix
  • fix(ddc): handle missing IOAVServiceCreateWithService symbol gracefully
  • fix(device): log disk capacity read failure instead of swallowing error
  • fix(disk): log scan cache write failure instead of swallowing error
  • fix(editor-kernel): replace 9 force unwraps with safe optional binding in LineEditingController
  • fix(editor-kernel): replace unnecessary force unwrap with constants in cursor motion
  • fix(issues): surface persist failures instead of silently discarding user actions
  • fix(layout): fix MainActor isolation warnings in LayoutPlugin tests
  • fix(llm-provider): override lumiResolveAPIKey in compatible provider base classes
  • fix(llm-provider): pin Aliyun storage key to historical capitalized form
  • fix(message-renderer): show tool calls regardless of verbosity level
